evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Monitor performance and continuously improve work methods
evidence.domain_risk: Serve as primary contact for both clients and team
evidence.data_team_maturity: Lead software development teams and projects
evidence.jd_authorship: Lead software development teams and projects; Inspire and develop team members; Provide resources (technology, skills, capacity) for success

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Monitor performance and continuously improve work methods
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Emphasis on process improvement and monitoring signals a rigour-oriented approach; no velocity language present.
domain_risk_quote: Serve as primary contact for both clients and team
domain_risk_reasoning: Client-facing software development role affects business decisions and revenue but lacks financial or regulatory compliance language.
data_team_maturity_quote: Lead software development teams and projects
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Role assumes established software development function exists, though this is a team lead rather than data-specific role.
jd_authorship_quote: Lead software development teams and projects; Inspire and develop team members; Provide resources (technology, skills, capacity) for success
jd_authorship_reasoning: Entirely generic management boilerplate with no technical specificity, scale context, or tool/methodology detail.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Develop client relationships and seek new opportunities
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: Primary responsibilities emphasize client relationship development and supporting GTM/sales activities.
autonomy_level_quote: Lead software development teams and projects; Support sales and client acquisition
autonomy_level_reasoning: Role combines strategic leadership of team direction (lead, develop) with execution support for business-set objectives (support sales).
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Monitor performance and continuously improve work methods; Contribute to process and tool development
ai_role_quote: Lead software development teams and projects
ai_role_reasoning: The role focuses on team leadership and project management without mention of AI tools or infrastructure
testing_framing_quote: Monitor performance and continuously improve work methods
testing_framing_reasoning: Performance and methods are mentioned but no explicit ownership of testing or quality practices
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Lead software development teams and projects; Support sales and client acquisition
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Responsibilities emphasize delivery and growth with no compliance, reliability, or risk-mitigation framing
